raw_consumer_statement:
b'I am filing a complaint against Barclays US regarding mishandling of a chargeback request.
I purchased a XXXX XXXX business-class ticket on XXXX XXXX XXXX (Ticket 7XXXX XXXX) using my Barclays XXXX XXXX XXXX. XXXX XXXX canceled the flight XXXX) on XXXX XXXX XXXX, and failed to issue a refund. I declined their alternative offer and requested a full refund.
I contacted Barclays to initiate a chargeback but encountered repeated issues. Due to a separate fraud incident in XXXX XXXX, my original card (ending XXXX) was canceled and replaced by card XXXX, then replaced again by card XXXX. Barclays provided inconsistent explanations about why the chargeback could not proceed, blaming the card cancellation, then reopening a new dispute, then transferring the case to the XXXX dispute team.
I was told the dispute was opened XXXX XXXX XXXX, but it remains in "Pending State." I have received no written confirmation of provisional credit, no clear timeline, and no resolution despite multiple calls and assurances.
Barclays has made the chargeback process confusing, delayed, and unnecessarily difficult, even though Visa and consumer protection rules clearly allow disputes after card replacement for canceled services.
I request immediate chargeback processing for XXXX, written confirmation of final resolution, and an investigation into Barclays' mishandling of credit card dispute procedures following card replacement due to fraud.'
